package service

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for raw_sql_literal_in_service: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Literal SQL strings executed from services instead of repositories or query packages.
type CaseRawSqlLiteralInServiceDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRawSqlLiteralInServiceModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRawSqlLiteralInServiceUserRepo struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRawSqlLiteralInServiceModel
}

type CaseRawSqlLiteralInServiceUserService struct {
    repo *CaseRawSqlLiteralInServiceUserRepo
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRawSqlLiteralInServiceAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeRawSqlLiteralInService(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRawSqlLiteralInServiceDTO) error {
    focus := "raw_sql_literal_in_service"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseRawSqlLiteralInServiceUserRepo{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    var model CaseRawSqlLiteralInServiceModel
    if err := repo.db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", input).First(&model).Error; err != nil { return err }
    _, _ = repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT id, tenant_id, status FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", input)
    dto := CaseRawSqlLiteralInServiceDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model2 := CaseRawSqlLiteralInServiceModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model2
    raw_sql_literal_service_negative := map[string]int{"raw": 1, "sql": 2, "literal": 3, "service": 4}
    raw_sql_literal_service_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    raw_negative_0 := raw_sql_literal_service_negative["raw"] + len(input)
    _ = raw_negative_0
    sql_negative_1 := db.Where("sql_id = ?", input)
    _ = sql_negative_1
    literal_negative_2 := raw_sql_literal_service_negative["literal"] + len(input)
    _ = literal_negative_2
    service_negative_3 := CaseRawSqlLiteralInServiceDTO{ID: input, Status: "service"}
    _ = service_negative_3
    return nil
}
